runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260210.1

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN set -eux; \
  apt-get update -q; \
  apt-get install -yq --no-install-recommends \
    make \
    build-essential \
    git \
    libssl-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev \
    libreadline-dev \
    libsqlite3-dev \
    curl \
    libncursesw5-dev \
    xz-utils \
    tk-dev \
    libxml2-dev \
    libxmlsec1-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    liblzma-dev \
    python3 \
    python3-venv \
    ca-certificates \
    bash \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /code
COPY . /code

ENV PATH="/code/bin:/code/plugins/python-build/bin:${PATH}"

# Sanity check to ensure the repo binaries can run
RUN /code/bin/pyenv --version || true

# Default to a helpful command; the repo provides a functional pyenv CLI
CMD ["pyenv", "--help"]

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260210.1

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build and runtime dependencies
RUN set -eux; \
    apt-get update -q; \
    apt-get install -yq --no-install-recommends \
        make \
        build-essential \
        git \
        libssl-dev \
        zlib1g-dev \
        libbz2-dev \
        libreadline-dev \
        libsqlite3-dev \
        curl \
        libncursesw5-dev \
        xz-utils \
        tk-dev \
        libxml2-dev \
        libxmlsec1-dev \
        libffi-dev \
        liblzma-dev \
        python3 \
        python3-dev \
        python3-pip \
        ca-certificates \
        bash \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /code
COPY . /code

# Build and install pyenv and python-build using the project's Makefile targets
RUN make install

# Add pyenv to PATH and set entrypoint to a simple check
ENV PATH="/code/bin:/code/plugins/python-build/bin:${PATH}"
ENTRYPOINT ["/bin/bash", "-lc", "pyenv --version || echo 'pyenv not installed' && bash"]
"}

FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260210.1

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN set -eux; \
  apt-get update -q; \
  apt-get install -yq --no-install-recommends \
    make \
    build-essential \
    git \
    libssl-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    libbz2-dev \
    libreadline-dev \
    libsqlite3-dev \
    curl \
    libncursesw5-dev \
    xz-utils \
    tk-dev \
    libxml2-dev \
    libxmlsec1-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    liblzma-dev \
    python3 \
    python3-venv \
    ca-certificates \
    bash \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /code
COPY . /code

ENV PATH="/code/bin:/code/plugins/python-build/bin:${PATH}"
